
# Allow all crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap

<<<<<<< HEAD
# Specific rules for major crawlers
=======
# Allow all major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandexbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /
=======
# Crawl-delay
Crawl-delay: 1
>>>>>>> origin/ziontechgroup-improvements

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /.git/

<<<<<<< HEAD
# Allow access to static assets
Allow: /css/
Allow: /js/
Allow: /images/
Allow: /assets/
Allow: /favicon.ico
Allow: /logo192.png
Allow: /manifest.json

# Sitemap locations
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.json

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Host directive
Host: https://ziontechgroup.com
=======
# Allow important pages
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /services
Allow: /technologies
>>>>>>> origin/ziontechgroup-improvements
